title: Count Ways To Build Good Strings
titleCn: 统计构造好字符串的方案数

testcases.input: low = 3, high = 3, zero = 1, one = 1 Output: 8 Explanation: One possible valid good string is "011". It can be constructed as follows: "" -> "0" -> "01" -> "011". All binary strings from "000" to "111" are good strings in this example.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: One possible valid good string is "011". It can be constructed as follows: "" -> "0" -> "01" -> "011". All binary strings from "000" to "111" are good strings in this example.

testcases.input: low = 2, high = 3, zero = 1, one = 2 Output: 5 Explanation: The good strings are "00", "11", "000", "110", and "011".
